items.title: Noma head chef resigns from restaurant amid abuse allegations
items.dek: René Redzepi had previously apologised after ex-employees of the Danish restaurant accused him of creating a toxic work environment.
items.body: René Redzepi had previously apologised after ex-employees of the Danish restaurant accused him of creating a toxic work environment.

items.title: Bodies of two Chinese backpackers found in Australian floodwaters
items.dek: The pair had been reported missing on Tuesday after failing to reach their destination.
